subject: refactor(theme): simplify to dark/light toggle, drop system mode
body:
Three-way toggle (dark/light/system) was unnecessary complexity for
non-technical users. Now a single boolean persisted as theme_dark.
Menu shows "Light mode" (sun icon) when dark, "Dark mode" (moon icon)
when light — one tap to switch.

Tags: theme, ux, simplification
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theming
Semver: patch
